title: wedelia gentryi
intro: Wedelia gentryi, also known as the butterfly weed or Mexican honeysuckle, is a flowering plant species in the sunflower family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Wedelia gentryi include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating various skin conditions. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its leaves can also be used in herbal preparations such as salves and creams.
